title: Moderation update: abuse reports handled
body: We reviewed today’s highest-severity moderation reports. Two accounts were validated for harmful behavior and removed: one for cross-channel phishing/spam and one for targeted harassment of newcomers. We also reviewed a separate high-severity report that was determined to be a false positive and did not take action on that member. The handled abuse reports have been closed. Thanks to everyone who reported issues quickly and helped keep the community safe.
